subject: App keeps bouncing me back to login on iPhone
body: On my iPhone in Safari I sign in, finish 2FA, and then land back on the login screen again. I tried three times and can't stay logged in long enough to check orders.

subject: CSV export downloads blank file
body: Export to CSV completes but the downloaded file only has headers and no rows. This started today and blocks my finance handoff.

subject: Looks like I was billed twice
body: I upgraded once this morning but my card statement shows two charges from your company. Please confirm whether one will be reversed automatically.

subject: Mobile login loops after verification code
body: After I enter the texted verification code on mobile Safari, the page flashes and sends me back to sign in. Desktop Chrome works.

subject: Password reset email never arrived
body: I requested a password reset twice and nothing has hit my inbox or spam folder. Can you trigger it manually?

subject: CSV export is missing customer names
body: The CSV file downloads, but several columns including customer name are empty even though they appear in the web table.

subject: Charged twice for monthly plan
body: Our admin only clicked upgrade once, but we have two invoice emails and two identical card charges. Please fix this before accounting closes books.

subject: Dashboard very slow this afternoon
body: Pages that normally load in a second are taking 15 to 20 seconds. Reports are especially slow and time out sometimes.

subject: iOS login keeps kicking me out
body: I can log in from my laptop, but on iOS Safari I get kicked out immediately after the home page appears. It feels like the session never sticks.

subject: Request for dark mode
body: Our support team works nights and would really appreciate a dark mode. The white background is rough in low light.

subject: Exported CSV contains garbled characters
body: Names with accents are coming through as broken characters in the CSV export. Excel opens it, but the encoding looks wrong.

subject: Duplicate charge and no refund confirmation
body: I already emailed earlier this week. We were charged twice on the Pro annual plan and still have not received any refund timeline.

subject: Login loop only on mobile browser
body: This only happens on my phone browser. I sign in, see the dashboard for a split second, then the app returns to the login page again.

subject: Typo in invoice email
body: Your invoice email says 'reciept' instead of 'receipt'. Not urgent, but it looks sloppy when forwarded to finance.

subject: CSV export cuts off after 200 rows
body: Our report should have around 800 rows, but the downloaded CSV stops at 200 every time. The in-app table still shows all rows.

subject: Can't invite teammate
body: The invite modal spins forever after I enter my teammate's email address. We are blocked from onboarding two new reps.

subject: Stuck in mobile login loop again
body: This started after your last update. On mobile Safari the app keeps asking me to log in repeatedly and never holds the session cookie.

subject: Search results not matching exact account name
body: Searching the exact customer account name returns unrelated records first, so reps are opening the wrong accounts.

subject: Mobile sign-in redirects in circles
body: When I try signing in on my iPad, the app redirects between two pages and never lands me in the product. Desktop is fine.

subject: Feature request: schedule exports
body: It would help a lot if CSV exports could be scheduled weekly instead of run manually every Friday.
